evals.prompt: /bmad-architect Design architecture for a real-time chat application
What architecture should we use for our new microservice?

assertions: Asks about quality attributes and constraints

evals.prompt: Create an ADR for choosing PostgreSQL over MongoDB

expected.reason: User wants code implementation, not architecture — use iikit-07-implement

evals.prompt: Design the user interface for the chat feature

expected.reason: User wants UX design, not system architecture — use bmad-ux-designer

evals.prompt: /bmad-architect Design architecture for a CLI script
evals.setup: Project is a simple 200-line CLI tool
